component.name: FlaskConsoleOptions
component.custom-start-script: import sys sys.path.extend([WORKING_DIR_AND_PYTHON_PATHS]) from flask.cli import ScriptInfo locals().update(ScriptInfo(create_app=None).load_app().make_shell_context()) print("Python %s on %s\nApp: %s [%s]\nInstance: %s" % (sys.version, sys.platform, app.import_name, app.env, app.instance_path))

option.name: myCustomStartScript
option.value: import sys sys.path.extend([WORKING_DIR_AND_PYTHON_PATHS]) from flask.cli import ScriptInfo locals().update(ScriptInfo(create_app=None).load_app().make_shell_context()) print("Python %s on %s\nApp: %s [%s]\nInstance: %s" % (sys.version, sys.platform, app.import_name, app.env, app.instance_path))

project.component: { "keyToString": { "Python.Example (1).executor": "Run", "Python.Example.executor": "Run", "Python.FermiOperator.executor": "Debug", "Python.FermiStabilizerCode (1).executor": "Run", "Python.FermiStabilizerCode.executor": "Debug", "Python.FermionicStabilizerCode.executor": "Debug", "Python.Group.executor": "Debug", "Python.KnillLaflamme.executor": "Run", "Python.LinearCode.executor": "Debug", "Python.MajoranaCode.executor": "Run", "Python.PauliStabilizerCode (1).executor": "Run", "Python.PauliStabilizerCode.executor": "Run", "Python.PhysicsQuantumCircuit.executor": "Run", "Python.Test.executor": "Run", "Python.test.executor": "Run", "Python.用qutip计算LSR (1).executor": "Debug", "Python.用qutip计算LSR.executor": "Run", "Python.精确对角化计算LSR.executor": "Run", "Python.脚本 (1).executor": "Run", "Python.脚本.executor": "Debug", "Python.计算LSR.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "WebServerToolWindowPanel.toolwindow.highlight.mappings": "true", "WebServerToolWindowPanel.toolwindow.highlight.symlinks": "true", "WebServerToolWindowPanel.toolwindow.show.date": "false", "WebServerToolWindowPanel.toolwindow.show.permissions": "false", "WebServerToolWindowPanel.toolwindow.show.size": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/moke_/Desktop/Cloud/Program/ToolBox/Algebra/TensorNetwork", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "com.jetbrains.python.configuration.PyActiveSdkModuleConfigurable", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

task.summary: Tenpy和Qutip使用工具，在Format结构下利用多态特点可以将一个问题在两种软件下求解，不需要为两种算法单独写代码，减小了代码冗余，为量子系统数值模拟格式化提供了一个有益尝试。
Tenpy和Qutip使用工具，在Format结构下利用多态特点可以将一个问题在两种软件下求解，不需要为两种算法单独写代码，减小了代码冗余，为量子系统数值模拟格式化提供了一个有益尝试。

MESSAGE.value: Tenpy和Qutip使用工具，在Format结构下利用多态特点可以将一个问题在两种软件下求解，不需要为两种算法单独写代码，减小了代码冗余，为量子系统数值模拟格式化提供了一个有益尝试。
